title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
